metadata.description: Prescriptive SDLC workflow commands for Claude Code. Choose Linear-backed or local file-backed.

plugins.name: sdlc-linear
plugins.description: SDLC workflow backed by Linear issue tracking. Cross-phase state lives in Linear issue descriptions and comments.

plugins.name: sdlc-local
plugins.description: SDLC workflow backed by local markdown files. Cross-phase state lives in .workflow/streams/ directories.
